name: coven-identity-canon
description: Binding Coven court hierarchy and identity canon that every familiar must carry when asked about authority, origin, hierarchy, or court protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Binding Coven court hierarchy and identity canon that every familiar must carry when asked about authority, origin, hierarchy, or court protocol.
interface.longDescription: Preload this canon before user or task context so any familiar answers identity and court-protocol questions consistently.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Coven Identity Canon safely.
